title: Rocky Mountain Rangers
writer: Barry Shipman, Earle Snell, J. Benton Cheney
actors: Robert Livingston, Raymond Hatton, Duncan Renaldo
plot: This entry in Republic's "Three Mesquiteers" series has a misnomer for a title since the action takes place in Texas and pre-statehood Oklahoma, and the Rocky Mountains are in neither state, but Republic, which easily produced the...
